task: refactor: migrate the 14 report generators in reports/ from os.path joins to pathlib.Path. Mechanical change, no behavior difference; output paths must stay byte-identical.
diff:
diff --git a/reports/gen_01.py b/reports/gen_01.py
index aa01b10..bb01c21 100644
--- a/reports/gen_01.py
+++ b/reports/gen_01.py
@@ -3,12 +3,11 @@
-import os
+from pathlib import Path

 def output_path(base, name):
-    return os.path.join(base, "out", name + ".html")
+    return str(Path(base) / "out" / (name + ".html"))

 def ensure_dir(base):
-    if not os.path.isdir(os.path.join(base, "out")):
-        os.makedirs(os.path.join(base, "out"))
+    Path(base, "out").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

rationale: Large mechanical refactor spanning 3 reviewed chunks; every hunk is the same correct transformation and tests pass. Exercises chunk aggregation ('approved (all chunks passed)') — a false-reject on any single chunk fails the whole case.
